bead.title: Reconcile feature traceability checker with STP covers authority
bead.description:
Context: `tests/test_feature_story_traceability.py` still enforces the older feature-story matrix and `E2E|Test:` references in feature files. Current test authority is the STP plus `@covers` model checked by `scripts/check_covers_traceability.py`. Reconcile the test and `docs/helix/03-test/feature-story-e2e-traceability.md` so stale matrix expectations cannot fail or falsely pass readiness.

In-scope files: `tests/test_feature_story_traceability.py`, `docs/helix/03-test/feature-story-e2e-traceability.md`, and nearby traceability docs if needed.

Out-of-scope: closing individual STP-070..077 coverage gaps; those have separate beads.
bead.acceptance:
1. `python3 tests/test_feature_story_traceability.py` passes.
2. `python3 scripts/check_covers_traceability.py --format text` passes.
3. `ddx doc validate` passes.
